{"resultCode":true,"errCode":0,"errCodeDes":"ok","data":{"emailCanRegister":true,"smsCanRegister":true,"compulsoryInvitationCode":true,"hiddenInvitationCode":false,"systemName":"DSJ Exchange","systemPower":"CopyRight @2018-2026 DSJ Exchange All Rights Reserved","logo":"https://dsj24.oss-ap-southeast-1.aliyuncs.com/default/52946924084400128/20240512/0/180300875795116032.png","pcLogo":"https://dsj24.oss-ap-southeast-1.aliyuncs.com/default/52946924084400128/20240512/0/180300736011542528.png","pc2Logo":"https://dsj24.oss-ap-southeast-1.aliyuncs.com/default/52946924084400128/20240512/0/180300743733260288.png","globalNotify":"","customerServiceType":"SYSTEM","customerBtnIsHidden":false,"customerService":"SYSTEM","iosAppUrl":"https://dsj627.icu/dsj625.mobileconfig","iosAppUrlList":"https://dsj627.icu/dsj625.mobileconfig","androidAppUrl":"https://dsj627.icu/dsj625.apk","androidAppUrlList":"https://dsj627.icu/dsj625.apk","aboutPlatform":"

DSJ Exchange Global Professional Station is an innovative digital asset trading platform dedicated to serving professional trading users around the world, focusing on discovering and providing high-quality innovative digital asset investment opportunities. Currently, the platform provides trading and investment services for more than 40 digital asset products, and is headquartered in Australia and operated by a professional DSJ Exchange team. As the world's leading blockchain asset financial service provider, DSJ Exchange has provided high-quality services to millions of users from more than 130 countries, and has independent offices in Australia and Singapore, covering trading business and operation centers. DSJ Exchange and its sub-brands are in a global leading position in terms of technology platforms, product lines, security risk control systems, operations, and customer service systems, and are committed to providing users with a safe, convenient and efficient trading experience.

{"resultCode":true,"errCode":0,"errCodeDes":"ok","data":{"id":"220358679624941568","title":"Rules","createTime":1725039994000,"language":"ENGLISH","typeId":21,"text":"
Invitation Instructions
Enter the 'Invitation Center', copy the invitation link or invitation code, and share it with your friends. Friends can become your subordinates by registering with your invitation code.
 
Earn rebates
When subordinates trade, you can get corresponding rebates, which supports up to three levels of subordinates. For example, you invited friend A, A invited B, and B invited C. Then A, B, and C can get corresponding rebates when they trade contracts on the platform.
 
Team level
The more first-level subordinates you promote, the higher the team level, and the higher the rebate you can enjoy. The team level is divided into LV1-LV6. The upgrade rules are shown in the following table, where 'N' is the number of first-level subordinates who have recharged and completed real-name authentication.
 
When subordinates trade delivery contracts, you can get rebates corresponding to their transaction amount.
","index":1,"imgSrc":null,"pageNum":0,"pageSize":20}}
